login.title: Sign In
login.description: Enter your credentials to sign in
login.email_not_verified: Email not verified. Check your inbox.

forgot_password.title: Reset password
forgot_password.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
forgot_password.success_description: We sent a password reset link to {email}

signup.title: Sign Up
signup.name: Name
signup.password_placeholder: At least 8 characters with special symbols
signup.accept_terms: I agree to the terms of service

verification.title: Check your email
verification.description: We sent a verification link to {email}
verification.check_inbox: Click the link in the email to verify your account. Check your spam folder if you don't see it.

google.unlink_confirm_description: Are you sure you want to unlink your Google account? You can link it again at any time.

telegram.unlink_confirm_description: Are you sure you want to unlink your Telegram account? You can link it again at any time.

validation.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.password_min_length: Password must be at least {min} characters
validation.password_strength: Password must contain uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and special characters
validation.name_min_length: Name must be at least {min} characters
validation.accept_terms_required: You must accept the terms of service
